description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a wooden handle and a robust metal head. The handle is straight, smooth, and made from light-colored wood, providing a comfortable grip for manual tasks. The head is black and metallic, with one side forming a flat striking face for driving nails and the opposite side split into two curved claws for prying and removing nails. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced with a visible circular metal wedge, securing the head firmly in place. The hammer's design is utilitarian and typical for use in construction, carpentry, or general repairs. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present, giving it a clean and well-maintained appearance.
description: A classic claw hammer with a smooth wooden handle and a black metal head featuring a striking face and curved claws. The design is clean, sturdy, and typical for construction or repair tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the black metal head with both the striking face and the claw visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the handle and the two-pronged claw, with the striking face and the circular wedge securing the head also visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the head, with the claw and striking face visible from a mirrored perspective compared to view 0.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the full width of the head, the two-pronged claw, and the flat striking face, with the handle tapering away.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, smooth finish, light brown color, no visible grip enhancements or texturing.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head, black metal, with a flat striking face on one side and a two-pronged curved claw on the other for nail removal.
